basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Associate-I Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree/ Master's degree in Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree/ Master's degree in Engineering from a recognized university or equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Associate-I Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: annauniv.edu.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Anna University Project Associate-I Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Anna University Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Project Associate-I post at Anna University is 25th June 2026. Candidates are strongly advised to submit their applications well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Associate-I position?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Associate-I position, candidates must possess a Bachelor's degree or a Master's degree in Engineering from a university that is recognized by the government or an equivalent qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Associate-I position will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 48,100, which includes both salary and House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Anna University Project Associate-I recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out carefully, attach necessary documents, and send it via Speed Post or Registered Post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Associate-I post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate-I post will involve two stages: a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Project Associate-I post at Anna University is on a contractual basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q8. Where is Anna University located?
faq.answer: Anna University is located in Chennai, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 600025. The recruitment is for a position within this esteemed institution.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Tamil Nadu. While not explicitly stated, government job notifications often prioritize local candidates. However, candidates from other states meeting the eligibility criteria can apply, but they should check the official notification for any specific state-related clauses.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should be attached with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to attach self-attested copies of essential documents with their application form. This typically includes a recent photograph, signature, valid ID proof, and relevant educational certificates and mark sheets.
